name: Favorite Chocolate Marbled Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Beat in sugar, egg, and vanilla to blend thoroughly.
2. Prepare the brownie batter according to package instructions.
3. Spread half of the batter into a greased 9x13 baking pan (use butter for best results).
4. Top with the cream cheese mixture, then add the remaining brownie batter, swirling with a knife blade to create a marbled effect.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Cool on a rack before frosting and chilling to set.
Chocolate-Sour Cream Topping:
1. Melt milk chocolate chips using a double boiler or microwave (stir frequently).
2. Stir in sour cream if omitted.
